# Sarza AI

> Sarza AI helps companies integrate AI. We figure out where AI actually fits, then build and
> integrate it so it saves real time and money. Every engagement starts with a free one on one
> consult to confirm we are a good fit and find the best opportunities; pricing is scoped per company.

## About
Sarza AI is an AI integration and consulting firm for companies. We start with a free one on
one consult to see if we are a good fit and map where AI can help, then handle the build end
to end, integrate with the tools you already use, and train your team. No coding required on
your side.
Contact: hello@sarza.ai (replies within 24 hours).

Reported outcomes for clients after 30–90 days: ~40% average cost reduction, up to 3×
productivity increase, ~60% less time spent on customer support, ~8 hours/week saved on
admin, and 2× faster lead response. Typical time to first results is about 30 days.

## Services
- [AI Automation Setup](https://sarza.ai/services): Identify and automate the most
  time-consuming manual tasks (inbox, scheduling, follow-ups) and integrate with existing tools.
- [AI Customer Support](https://sarza.ai/services): A 24/7 AI assistant trained on the
  business, handling FAQs, bookings, and common requests with handoff to humans when needed.
- [AI Audit & Roadmap](https://sarza.ai/services): A full workflow audit with ROI projections
  and a 30/60/90-day implementation plan.
- [AI Content System](https://sarza.ai/services): An AI content engine for social posts,
  newsletters, blog drafts, and marketing copy in the brand's voice.
- [Team AI Training](https://sarza.ai/services): Hands-on workshops, role-specific materials,
  and a prompt library tailored to the team's tools.
- [AI Retainer & Support](https://sarza.ai/services): Ongoing optimization, new-tool rollout,
  priority support, and quarterly strategy reviews.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://sarza.ai/): Overview, process, and results.
- [Services](https://sarza.ai/services): Full list of services and what each includes.
- [AI Employee ROI Calculator](https://sarza.ai/calculator): A free, instant tool that estimates
  the additional annual revenue and ROI a small business could gain from a 24/7 AI employee that
  answers every lead instantly (after-hours capture, speed-to-lead lift, staff hours reclaimed).
- [AI Fit Quiz](https://sarza.ai/quiz): A free 2-minute quiz that asks about a business's time
  drains, lead volume, response speed, tools, goals, and timeline, then returns an AI fit result
  with recommended starting points. The primary lead-qualification path on the site.
- [Blog](https://sarza.ai/blog): Practical, jargon free guides on putting AI to work.
- [Contact](https://sarza.ai/contact): Book a free one on one consult.

## Articles
- [How Much Does AI Automation Cost for a Small Business?](https://sarza.ai/blog/how-much-does-ai-automation-cost):
  What drives the price, realistic ranges, and how to tell if a project pays for itself.
- [The 5 Tasks Every Small Business Should Automate With AI First](https://sarza.ai/blog/which-tasks-to-automate-first):
  The highest-ROI starting points — customer questions, follow-ups, scheduling, data entry, and content.

## How to engage
Book a free one on one consult via https://sarza.ai/contact or email hello@sarza.ai.
There are no fixed packages; pricing is scoped to each company after the consult.
